name: 301 Warriors
short_description: This is a naked-eye 3D, casual action game.
detailed_description:
"301 Warriors" - Ode to Devouring Corpses: The Era of Ants

This is a medieval-style naked-eye 3D casual action game that combines gameplay elements such as zombie fighting, boss battles, and siege warfare. It includes 10 levels. In the April 20, 2025 update, enemy attributes were significantly weakened, while the player's initial abilities were strengthened. The total playtime is about 5 hours.

The game tells a touching story about growth and transformation. I believe the final ending will deeply move you.

With your support, I will continue to update more exciting content, growing this world together with you.

Game Controls Guide:

Movement: Use the W, A, S, D keys on the keyboard to control character movement.

Jump: Press the Spacebar to make the character jump.

Exit Game: Press the ESC key in the upper left corner of the keyboard to exit the game and return to the main menu.

Keyboard Skills:

Q Key: Release an area freeze skill to immobilize surrounding enemies.

E Key: Restore a portion of the character's HP.

R Key: Repel the enemy.

Mouse Controls:

Right-click: Enhances character movement elegance and helps escape enemy encirclement.

Click the middle mouse button to switch between two skills:

  • Dash forward

  • Generate a portal in front of the player that lasts for 3 seconds

Skill Upgrade Runes are special items. Once obtained, be sure to promptly save your game at a checkpoint. Otherwise, if your character dies, unsaved level progress will be lost, and any collected Skill Upgrade Runes will disappear when you reload the game.

The gameplay is simple and easy to learn. If the difficulty feels too high, you can repeatedly reload your save to farm Rune enemies and enhance your character's stats.

The game uses a linear save mechanism, retaining only the most recent save data. Just like life, it is full of regrets—every choice leaves a permanent mark. If you select "Delete Save and Quit," everything will reset from scratch, beginning a brand-new journey.

You can refer to the game guide in the community for walkthroughs. If you're unable to watch the YouTube demo video, please contact me, and I'll make adjustments promptly. The Chinese guide video will be posted on Bilibili.

supported_languages: English, French, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Korean
